message.reasoning_content:
We are given 10 trajectory evidence cards for LunarLander-v2. All have terminated=true, truncated=false. The features show that final distance to target increased compared to initial (distance_improvement negative), indicating the lander moved away from pad. Final speeds are high (~2), vertical speed near zero, horizontal speed ~2, angle moderate (~0.4-0.7 rad ~23-40 degrees). Contact ratio last20 = 0.0 for all, so no leg contact. Terminal penalty -5 and no terminal bonus. These all seem like crashes: they most likely left viewport or crashed without landing (since no leg contact, distance increased). According to task: early_failure if episode ends early with little useful progress. These episodes are fairly short (84-173 steps, out of max 1000). They show little progress (distance increased, no leg contact, high speed). So they should be classified as early_failure. Also note: use_for_tage_pair should be true because they are clear.

Thus for all 10 trajectories: coarse_label = "early_failure", use_for_tage_pair = true.
